summary: Iteration 13 — Zelda the All-Knowing Crystal Vision flow verified end-to-end. Backend: 3/3 pytest cases PASS (POST /api/programs/zelda with topic=Love, default topic, and /api/personas has Zelda at slot 6). Frontend: dial 1 -> oracle list shows 'Zelda the All-Knowing' at slot 6; dial 6 enters zelda_topic mode with all 9 topics (Love/Money/Career/Family/Friendship/Secrets/Upcoming Event/Difficult Decision/General Future); pressing 1 generates a full crystal-vision reading (moving scene + freeze frame + disturbance + final image + interpretation + Zelda sign-off 'The crystal grows dark, but the future continues beyond the glass...'). Regression: single # from result returned to oracle list, dial 2 still launches Cyndi & Louise guided flow, 0 from result returns to main menu.

test_results.backend_pytest: 3/3 PASS (/app/backend/tests/test_iteration13_zelda.py). Zelda endpoint returns persona_name='Zelda the All-Knowing', voice='shimmer', text (>20 chars) and sign_off containing 'crystal'. Personas roster still has Zelda at index 5 (slot 6 on the keypad).
test_results.zelda_flow_ui: PASS — Full flow: lift -> dial 1 -> CHOOSE YOUR ORACLE (Zelda at slot 6) -> dial 6 -> ZELDA TOPIC menu with 9 topics -> press 1 (Love) -> reading rendered incl. all 5 required parts + sign-off. Result mode footer shown: '✱ hear again · # another oracle · 0 main menu · hang up'.
test_results.zelda_regression_hash: PASS — Single # from result returned to CHOOSE ANOTHER ORACLE list.
test_results.zelda_regression_zero: PASS — 0 from result returned to DIALBOX NETWORK main menu.
test_results.cyndi_regression: PASS — Dial 2 still opens Cyndi & Louise topic menu (guided flow intact).

critical_code_review_comments: PhoneSimulator.jsx now ~1651 lines with Zelda added as yet another sub-state-machine (zelda_topic) on top of Cyndi/Ruby/Adventure/Trivia/etc. onKey() is a very long chain of if/else on mode. Strongly recommend extracting each Line (Fortune sub-oracles, MindLine, Magic8, KnockKnock, Adventure, Trivia) into its own hook/reducer before the next persona is added — it's approaching an unmaintainable size.
ZELDA_TOPICS and CYNDI_TOPICS are nearly identical shapes; consider a single reusable TopicMenu component for future oracles that follow the same 9-key topic pattern.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Zelda testids/flow: after dial 1 wait for 'CHOOSE YOUR ORACLE' then >=1600ms before dialing 6; wait for 'crystal awaits' before pressing a topic 1-9. Reading contains 'Zelda peers into the crystal...' then LLM output (~15-40s) then sign-off starting 'The crystal grows dark'. Universal LLM key currently funded (real readings generated). Zelda topics are keypad-only (no text input needed).
